zh.lifeSummary: 當Salome von Berg-Schelklingen於1090年出生在德國巴登-爾特波格阿爾-多瑙-可萊斯爾可林根時，她的父親Heinrich (I.) von Berg15歲，母親Adelheid von Mochental13歲。她於1115年與Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III在波蘭結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1144年7月27日在波蘭武奧吉武e其卡享年54歲，埋葬在波蘭馬左維次吉沃可。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Salome von Berg-Schelklingen于1090年出生在德国巴登-爾特波格阿爾-多瑙-可萊斯爾可林根时，她的父亲Heinrich (I.) von Berg15岁，母亲Adelheid von Mochental13岁。她于1115年与Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III在波兰结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1144年7月27日在波兰武奧吉武e其卡享年54岁，埋葬在波兰馬左維次吉沃可。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Salome
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of an unrecorded Aramaic name, akin to the Hebrew word shalom ‘peace’. It was common at the time of Christ, and was borne by one of the women who were at his tomb and witnessed the Resurrection (Mark 16:1–8). This would normally have led to its common use as a Christian name, and it is indeed found as such in medieval times. However, according to the Jewish historian Josephus, it was also the name of King Herod's stepdaughter, the daughter of Queen Herodias. In the Bible, a daughter of Herodias, generally identified as this Salome, danced for Herod and so pleased him that he offered to give her anything she wanted. Prompted by her mother, she asked for (and got) the head of John the Baptist, who was in one of Herod's prisons (Mark 6:17–28). This story so gripped medieval imagination that the name Salome became more or less taboo until the end of the 19th century, when Oscar Wilde wrote a play about her and some unconventional souls began to choose the name for their daughters.

en.lifeSummary: When Salome von Berg-Schelklingen was born in 1090, in Schelklingen, Alb-Donau-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germany, her father, Heinrich (I.) von Berg, was 15 and her mother, Adelheid von Mochental, was 13. She married Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III in 1115, in Poland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. She died on 27 July 1144, in Łęczyca, Łódź, Poland, at the age of 54, and was buried in Płock, Masovia, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Salome von Berg-Schelklingen est née en 1090, à Schelklingen, Alb-Donau-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Heinrich (I.) von Berg, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Adelheid von Mochental, avait 13 ans. Elle a épousé Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III en 1115, à Pologne. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée le 27 juillet 1144, à Łęczyca, łódzkie, Pologne, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterrée à Płock, mazowieckie, Pologne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Salome von Berg-Schelklingen 1090 in Schelklingen, Alb-Donau-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Heinrich (I.) von Berg 15 und ihre Mutter Adelheid von Mochental 13. Sie hat 1115 in Polen Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb am 27. Juli 1144 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Łęczyca, łódzkie, Polen und wurde in Płock, Masowien, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Salome von Berg-Schelklingen è nata il nel 1090 nel Schelklingen, Alb-Donau-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Heinrich (I.) von Berg, aveva 15 anni e sua madre, Adelheid von Mochental, aveva 13 anni. Lei sposato Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III nel 1115, nel Polonia. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 27 luglio 1144, nel Łęczyca, łódzkie, Polonia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolta a Płock, mazowieckie, Polonia.

ja.lifeSummary: Salome von Berg-Schelklingenが1090年にドイツバデン-ウuルッテンバーグアルブ-ドナウ-クレイスシェルクリンジェンで生まれた時，父Heinrich (I.) von Bergは15歳，母Adelheid von Mochentalは13歳であった。1115年にポーランドでKsiażę Bolesław Krzywousty IIIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1144年7月27日にポーランドloドズキleクズイカで54歳で死去し，ポーランドマゾウィエクイプlオックにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Salome von Berg-Schelklingen(이)가 1090년 독일 바데-wu르테버그 알브-도나-크레이스 셸클링에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Heinrich (I.) von Berg(은)는 15세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Adelheid von Mochental(은)는 13세였다. 그녀는 1115년 폴란드에서 Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1144년 7월 27일 폴란드 lo드즈키 le치이카에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 마즈위키 pl옥크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Salome von Berg-Schelklingen nasceu em 1090, em Schelklingen, Alb-Donau-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Heinrich (I.) von Berg, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Adelheid von Mochental, tinha 13 anos. Ela casou-se com Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III em 1115, em Polônia. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 27 de julho de 1144, em Łęczyca, łódzkie, Polônia, com 54 anos, e foi sepultada em Płock, mazowieckie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Salome von Berg-Schelklingen родилась в 1090 г. в местности щелклинген, алб-донау-крис, баден-вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Heinrich (I.) von Berg было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelheid von Mochental, 13. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III в 1115 г. в местности Польша. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла 27 июля 1144 г. в местности Ленчицкий, loдзки, Польша в возрасте 54 лет и была похоронена в местности Плоцкий повят, мазоуиекки, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Salome von Berg-Schelklingen nació en 1090, en Schelklingen, Alb-Donau-Kreis, Baden-Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Heinrich (I.) von Berg, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Adelheid von Mochental, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Ksiażę Bolesław Krzywousty III en 1115, en Polonia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 27 de julio de 1144, en Łęczyca, łódzkie, Polonia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultada en Płock, mazowieckie, Polonia.
